message:
refactor(search,status): extract SearchMaintenanceMode into asset_state module and add semantic status reporting

Search asset state extraction:
- Create src/search/asset_state.rs centralizing coarse-grained search
  asset truth (lexical freshness, active maintenance, semantic readiness)
  so callers stop inferring state from ad hoc file checks
- Move SearchMaintenanceMode (formerly IndexRunMode) from indexer into
  asset_state, as it is shared between the indexer lock protocol and
  the new status reporting path
- Expose LEXICAL_REBUILD_PAGE_SIZE_PUBLIC and add LexicalRebuildCheckpoint
  with load_lexical_rebuild_checkpoint() for structured checkpoint queries
- Add lexical_storage_fingerprint_for_db() public wrapper
- Gate LexicalRebuildSnapshot with #[cfg(test)] since it is only used
  in test assertions

Status/state enrichment:
- Add "semantic" section to state_meta_json with status, availability,
  summary, can_search, fallback_mode, preferred_backend, embedder_id,
  vector/hnsw paths, progressive_ready, and actionable hints
- Surface semantic status in run_status human-readable output
- Add "status" and "reason" fields to state_index_freshness
- Add --json/--robot flag to Status CLI command
- Use lexical/semantic asset structs instead of raw variable soup in
  state_meta_json for rebuild progress fields
- Add semantic equality assertion to cli_robot state/status parity test

Cleanup:
- Remove unused fs2::FileExt and std::io::Read imports from lib.rs
- Collapse empty struct variant bodies (Capabilities, ApiVersion, etc.)
- Remove trailing blank lines and redundant comments
- Extract SnippetExportRow type alias in pages/export.rs
- Change default_value to default for stale_threshold arg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
